title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude was used by the Atlassian Williams F1 Team to analyze thinking patterns from drivers and garage staff under race pressure, converting sensor readings into visualizations displayed on helmets, race suits, and garage displays at Monaco.
